message:
Wrap tools/call responses in MCP-required content array

The MCP spec requires tools/call results to be wrapped in a content
array with type/text entries. Previously, raw JSON was returned
directly as the result, which broke MCP client parsing.

Now both success and error responses use the proper format:
  { content: [{ type: "text", text: JSON.stringify(result) }] }

Closes #23

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
